title: Coordinal: A Postmortem.
whyItMatters: cart;horse : Most startups fail, this one did too. Tried too much with too little, with a little too much ego. Coordinal Research 's goal was to build an automated safety research platform. A researcher writes "Replicate X result from paper Y with tweak Z" and the system provisions a sandboxed compute environment, gathers context, writes code, runs experime…
